mano_cua.result_summary: Playground 页面只展示 PDF 第1页（canvas + annotationLayer），DOM 中无导航控件、无打印按钮、无分页 UI。mano-cua 通过 Elements 面板确认结构仅 div#app > div > div（PDF page container），页面不具备打印功能入口。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: This is a VERY MINIMAL vue-pdf demo that shows only page 1 of a multi-page PDF. There are NO navigation controls, NO print button, NO pagination in the DOM. The print functionality must be accessed through the browser's built-in print dialog.
